name: happycodex
description: Native reliability workflow for high-risk Codex changes with durable ExecPlans, system-boundary evidence, and fresh review.

interface.shortDescription: Durable system boundaries and fresh review
interface.longDescription: Complete long-running refactors, migrations, and other high-risk Codex changes with one Root writer, an immutable task baseline, a durable ExecPlan, acceptance evidence across the system boundary, compaction recovery from facts, and two-stage fresh native review.
defaultPrompt: Use $happycodex:happycodex with Goal for this compaction-prone migration.
Use $happycodex:happycodex with Fable 5 max review when available.
